# COMPANY CONTEXT*Created: Wednesday, March 11, 2026 at 10:04:19?AM*<div>COMPANY CONTEXT<b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><tt>BOUNTY.CO</tt></div>
<div>An influencer platform that automates User-Generated Content (UGC) for TikTok and Instagram creators. They have massive supply (creators), but need a ruthless outbound engine to sell to brands.</div>
<div>1. THE CORE NARRATIVE<b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><tt>YOUR MAIN ANGLE</tt></div>
<div><b><h2>Bounty has an amazing supply of content and creators. The missing piece is theĘengineĘthat distributes it. You are the architect who automates their outbound revenue pipeline.</h2></b></div>
<div><tt>TRIGGER PHRASE</tt></div>
<div><b>&quotThe Verified Supply Chain&quot</b></div>
<div>3. THE HARD STOP (10:28 AM)</div>
<div><i>&quotRayan, I want to be respectful of your time. I have a hard stop at 10:30 for a sync with an operations peer. I'm going to shoot you a quick note later today with my specific take on hardening the Agent-to-Human handoff we discussed. Sound good?&quot</i><br></div>
<div>2. CONVERSATION FLOW &amp QUESTIONS</div>
<div><b>Diagnose:</b>Ę&quotWhere precisely does the handoff between your automated systems and your human sales reps break down right now?&quot</div>
<div><b>Scale:</b>Ę&quotWhat does your outbound engine need to look like by Q3 to hit your revenue targets?&quot</div>
<div><b>Close:</b>Ę&quotMy first 30 days would be focused entirely on hardening this outbound loop. I'll send you a short spec later today on how I'd approach it.&quot</div>
<div><b>COPY FOLLOW-UP EMAIL</b><b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></b></div>
